title: Advanced Grammar
shortSummary: Master the final grammar pieces — the subjunctive in all tenses, advanced pronoun placement, passive voice, indirect speech, and the subtle grammar points that make your Spanish sound truly natural.
whyItMatters: Advanced grammar is the difference between being understood and sounding native. These structures let you express complex ideas with precision, handle formal writing, and understand literature and academic texts.
coreConcepts: Subjunctive in all tenses: present, imperfect, future, perfect
Advanced pronoun placement with compound verbs
Passive voice: ser + past participle vs se pasiva
Indirect speech: reporting what others said
Verbal periphrases: ir + gerund, llevar + gerund
